economic_mechanism: Regime classifies the dominant short-horizon risk: bullish non-collapse is monetized with put credit spreads, bearish non-rally with call credit spreads, and neutral elevated-IV ranges with iron condors; otherwise stand aside. Time decay plus 50% profit targets harvest swings inside a defined-risk envelope.
regime_envelope: bullish→PCS; bearish→CCS; neutral with iv_rank≥15→IC; else stand_aside
stand_aside_rule: Stand aside when regime is missing/unknown, neutral with low IV rank, credit/max-loss filters fail, or an open position already occupies the one-lot sleeve slot.
greek_intended: net short premium with defined max loss; small directional delta by regime; theta harvest
greek_dangerous: gap through short strike; vol expansion against short premium; IC two-sided risk
notes: Spine pilot: regime-first income stack. Control is unconditional PCS with same management (no routing). Proxy L0 only; cannot earn L1.
